input.hiring_signal_brief: Vantage Pay posted 5 senior backend engineer roles on LinkedIn over the last 7 days. All roles require Node.js and PostgreSQL experience.
input.bench_summary: Tenacious provides pre-vetted senior backend engineers on 2-week deployment timelines. Current bench: 4 Node.js engineers available.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: Output must contain zero banned phrases from the Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: end-to-end|circle back|hope this finds you well|best-in-class|just wanted to|leverage|reach out|touch base|synergy|just following up|circling back|synergize|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Output must reference the Node.js hiring signal from the brief.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Output must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
